**Determining strike announcement**

I need to determine if the document announces a new strike. It mentions an upcoming strike for SAD and Trentino Trasporti on January 9-10, 2026. The text says, "è stato indetto uno sciopero," which means that a strike has been announced. It discusses specific times for the strike, indicating it’s indeed an official notice. So, it seems to confirm that there’s an upcoming strike during the specified dates.
